title: cyclobalanopsis treubiana
intro: Cyclobalanopsis treubiana, also known as the Sumatran oak or Borneo oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis treubiana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia.
